creator: jonny@mailhost.coppe.ufrj.br
text:
I've uploaded skill-port.tgz to the FreeBSD incoming directory.

  It's a kill(1)/renice(8) utility, with extra features.

BTW: There's a comment on the Makefile:

# Bugs: skill.1 and snice.1 are hard links.  When compressed they
# are changed to independent files.  I'd like to change this...

If you know how to solve this problem, please make it so...
